texto: Each one seems to be, in some way, essentially different from the others, and each is a surprise to me. I think that making books, or any kind of art, might also be like mining. The artist digs into his or her life and imagination and never knows what they'll find. That's the adventure.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mordicai Gerstein: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Each one seems to be, in some way, essentially different from the others, and each is a surprise …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, vida, art pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de art e adventure.

frase_original: Each one seems to be, in some way, essentially different from the others, and each is a surprise to me. I think that making books, or any kind of art, might also be like mining. The artist digs into his or her life and imagination and never knows what they'll find. That's the adventure.
